[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100010 2
1 11100110 5
2 00100101 3
3 10100010 3
4 00110001 3
5 11101001 5
6 11000010 3
7 01111001 5

01 10 00100000 1
12 21 00100000 1
23 32 00100001 2
34 43 11000000 2
45 54 01000000 1
56 65 00100000 1
67 76 00100010 2 match 0
70 07 00100100 2

02 20 00100001 2
13 31 10100000 2
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 01101001 4
46 64 00000010 1
57 75 01100000 2
60 06 00100000 1
71 17 10100010 3 match 3

03 30 00100001 2
14 41 10000010 2
25 52 00110001 3 match 4
36 63 00100000 1
47 74 11000010 3 match 6
50 05 00100001 2
61 16 00100010 2 match 0
72 27 00100000 1

04 40 00000000 a
15 51 00100000 1
26 62 00100000 1
37 73 11100000 3
